_meta.notes: food.jumia.ma redirects to www.jumia.ma. No dedicated produits_laitiers or fresh fruits_legumes categories exist on Jumia MA; fruits_legumes mapped to dry legumes, cereals, dried fruits. Boissons = coffee/tea/cacao only (no fresh drinks). robots.txt permits scraping with identified bot <200 req/min. Image URLs not available (lazy-loaded). Errors: 4 x 404 (boissons URL variants, laitiers, fruits-legumes direct URLs).
